root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lon_year, ' ' as c_div_code, sc_mem_m_capital_rate.share_rate, sc_share_m_constant.share_value_perunit, sc_mem_m_capital_rate.entry_date, sc_mem_m_capital_rate.entry_id, sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account, sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account, sc_acc_m_account_year.close_account_status FROM sc_mem_m_capital_rate, sc_share_m_constant, sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE ( sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lon_year ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lon_year ASC
